title: Fireballs by Juix
description: Datapack adding fireballs you can throw
body:
# ℹ️ Fireballs By Juix The Fireballs pack will simply add fireballs to your game, crafted from fire charges. Now you can finally launch those f*cking fire charges !

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d2804c6a17e3aa1aaaf4884fc4ce57773dc75b8.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.3] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.7+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes & Details Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) This pack comes with 3 new items : - **Fireball** : Explosion power of 1 (2 if boosted) - **Super Fireball** : Explosion power of 3 (6 if boosted) - **Mega Fireball** : Explosion power of 5 (10 if boosted)
You can craft Fireballs & Super fireballs & Mega fireballs these ways :

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abaa2d792cb80e5513c8b66c6964f588622d892f.png)
# 🆕 Options - **_/execute as <@player> run function fbs_data:items/launch_fireball_** - **_/execute as <@player> run function fbs_data:items/launch_super_fireball_** - **_/execute as <@player> run function fbs_data:items/launch_mega_fireball_**

It lets you throw fireballs via commands, for your minigames for example ! (v1.2+)

- **_/function datapack:fireballs_datapack/change_fireballs_power_** | Disables damage to the terrain, or conversely boosts (x2) the explosion power of fireballs (v1.4+) !
# 🪳 Known issues - No known issue for now Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
